features.name: Inner Ring Control
features.description: Right lane starts the inner ring, which cycles 25 to 200 in steps of 25 until a bumper hit locks it.
features.goal: Lock the inner ring to set the center bumper score override.

features.name: Outer Ring Control
features.description: Top lane starts the outer ring, which cycles 10 to 80 in steps of 10 until a bumper hit locks it.
features.goal: Lock the outer ring to set the satellite bumper score override.

features.name: Bumper Score Compose
features.description: Center bumper score follows the locked inner value, and satellite bumper scores follow the locked outer value.
features.goal: Apply defaults when unlocked and ring overrides when locked.
